see all these properties I've divided them into groups for example all the properties of box model are at one place the properties of colors are at one place the templates layout is at one place and the table is at one place all these properties are going to be at one place now you guys see one thing here whenever you read CSS you can see that properties are not left no one can remember the properties if I tell you to read all the properties you can't do that so whenever you want to do a quick revision of a CSS you know it, you just want to take a quick look at all the properties so you can take it from here and if you want to use any property you can copy it here now yes I know that you can do this with emmet in VS code but here I want to tell you that if you are coding in phone then you can copy paste it directly from here I made a video in which I told you how to run VS code in phone how to use online IDE so if you are using any online IDE then also you can copy paste it and use all these properties now if you want to learn CSS properly then I have made a whole course of CSS in which I have given you notes so you can put CSS with notes here you will get my tutorial of notes you are not going to give an exam you are not going to make a website so you have to do that kind of work then you have to paste it on the wall all the properties should be in front of you all
